text: The problem started 2 weeks ago with my wife's phone .Her messages would be received via text but she could not send out text. Countless calls to T-Mobile and the problem was never figured out until today two weeks later it seems that she was flagged as a spammer for having group text, Simply keeping in contact with the seniors that she used to teach Fitness to at the YMCA. So according to the representative there is no solution or reversal to this problem ,she was flagged by the technical department and her text ability is turned off for 10 days.Why was there no call or text to her to ask why she was group texting so much(Maybe covid) ? I have had enough and I will be canceling T-Mobile after 14 years due to this situation and many other situations that have shown how this conglomerate company thinks that they can do whatever they want to the consumer and blame it on the pandemic and not there incompetence or there own cost cutting tactics.Ryan Reynolds here we come!

The customer service I have received from the College Station, TX store and online has been terrible. I tried to trade in a phone, but was not sent the return slip like I was told I would. No one knew why, nor could they figure out how to resolve it. They have not made an effort to help me.
Excellent Customer Service, extremely helpful and understanding during the pandemic... would highly recommend T-MOBILE as a mobile carrier!!

I wanted to add a line and get a phone for my daughter. This included porting over her number from a different carrier. This should be a simple, routine transaction, shouldn't it? I mean, this is fundamental to the company's mission, isn't it?

Multiple phone calls, and literally hours later, it's still not done. The hold waits are endless unless you call midnight and get someone on the other side of the world who knows nothing and cannot help. 

I've been transferred around endlessly from low-level employee to low-level employee, all asking for the same information again, and then transferring me somewhere else. 

Meanwhile, they changed my web experience over to a business-based one where everything is different, I don't have access to basic functions, and can't get the information I need. The old website was bad, this is worse. 

It's clear the core functions of customer service and frictionless ability to accomplish basic things are not priorities at T-mobile. It feels like things are intentionally made more difficult. What should be an automated, seamless experience in an online portal has become a nightmare of hold waits, bad English, long conversations, and days without a working phone. Why?

WARNING: T-mobile does not have a plan that includes free conference calling! They charge .01 a minute for this service. During COVID-19 most people are working from home & this service is FREE with all other carriers except T-Mobile. IF YOU ARE WORKING FROM HOME DO NOT GO WITH T-MOBILE!!!

Terrible service. I have had tmobile for 2 months now and ever since making the switch, I have had slow internet and mobile service. I still do not have WiFi hooked up to my apartment so I rely on my internet service through my phones data plan. Customer support had told me the only solution would be to send a booster WHICH REQUIRES WIFI. If I had WiFi I would not need the booster! They have been nothing but unhelpful and cannot even provide and ETA for the completion of the towers in my area. They continue to tell me don’t worry because when the towers are up you will have the best service, BUT WHEN WILL THE TOWERS BE UP? I’m just supposed to sit here with my terrible internet with no deadline because tmobile can’t do anything. I hate this company, and should have never made the switch.

Having one of the worst customer service experiences with @T-Mobile. The third person to chat with about a sim unlock was a so-called supervisor named Tony who told me “you need to take some responsibility” in the issue I am having. No true empathy or remorse for the incorrect information provided by the previous representatives or experience I am going through. Now my cell service (phone) is being held hostage until weeks into August.

This review on Store # 1645 at Metrocenter location;
Let me start out by saying, I was a customer of Verizon for 21 years but Verizon  rates are outrageous for plans now. Coverage for wi fi in my area where I live in a mobile court is bad. Verizon unlimited was out of range as competitors & too many Surcharges added on to cost per month. 
I looked to TMobile & found exactly what I needed. Seniors  rates, unlimited  everything, could keep my old phone number & I needed to buy new phones anyway because ours were outdated.  TMobile has phones that are 50% off & some free phones depending on plan. For me, I am a senior, retired, on fixed income, needed to lower costs per month. 
TMobile has everything I needed, at best low rates per line, & bought found 2 phones. My husband only wanted standard new flip mobile phone but I wanted High Tech, 2020 model phone with all the best everything a phone could offer. 
I bought, Samsung A71 5G.
I got it 50% off right now with Senior 55+ Essential  plan, unlimited everything 2 lines.
$55 + taxes with Autopay. Per mo. 
I called the store first to find out if phones I wanted were in stock, a lady Sandra said she had them & would put them aside for us till I could come in.
When I went to store Sandra was there, recalled who I was & had the phones waiting there for me. She helped me pick out best choices that would fit for my needs. TMobile has a lot of price ranges to choose  from with phones accessories but Sandra listened to me & helped me choose just what I had said I wanted in my budgeting range. Sandra also made all transfers from old phones to new ones, even keeping same phone numbers. She put all accessories I bought on phones, & let me pick from vary of colors & styles I was looking for.
Sandra was excellent in her willingness to help me in anyway I needed. She set up all transfers of photos & contacts & apps, etc. that I asked her to do. She took her time,  wrote out all info I needed to do with me for use when I get home to follow up on. Her customer friendly behavior was by far, 
"Outstanding"!.
I felt after I left store I had the best service for my money & felt like I was assured if I needed anything else from TMobile I would get  supportive quality services here.
I am grateful for taking the move to TMobile. 
Thank you Sandra, & associate Ben, for your service. 
Sincerely, 
Sherrie &Dennis P

I bought a phone at the Lemon Grove store on Broadway. When I left the store my old phone had no service and the new phone was not setup. I had to put the screen protector on myself. After I was able to access my new phone I had to transfer files,photos, messages, contacts and notes. It took awhile but got ot done. Not the best service. I have been with T-mobile 13 years. First bad experience.

I have used many other phone service providers in the past and T-Mobile has hands down the best customer service.  I would even go as far to say that they have the best customer service out of any business that I've ever dealt with.  They always make sure you are satisfied.  I can not say enough good things about this provider.

I got T-Mobile in 2014 because my son needed a phone I switched from Verizon to be on T-Mobile and it’s been hell this
Company is not equipped to do what other providers do to help their customer my son just got off my plain to his own and it has taken T-Mobile over a week to just transfer his phone to his account he’s done everything he could for them to do it even paying off his equipment I’ve been so stressed because it makes no sense that we have always paid our bill on time over three years and I have had 8 people lie and make excuses to why it hasn’t been fixed anyone who is considering T-Mobile don’t do it I’m going back to Verizon yes their phones are cheaper but it’s not worth the stress they are a company from hell

edits.text: Can you believe the entire T-Mobile system is down I’m stranded and I can’t call out or receive any calls because of a technical difficulty every customer service is down this sh... is  unacceptable and I will be going back to Verizon

text: The worst coverage ever had. Calls sometimes doesn't connect. sometimes I can't hear the other party and vise versa. Sometimes no data connexion no coverage. Even inside the city.
Issues slow or no service.  called talked to Keith in Alabama. What a nice guy. all is good.

Sense all this covid mess I was told we didn't have to pay on the bill and I did anyways I paid 100 a week with unemployment bc I knew it was behind well even after paying them 600 dollars if not more still owed 700 bc what I had paid them was for late fees and etc mind u I paid them every week for 8 weeks not just once a month and now I just paid 150 last week 150 this week now my phone is off when they set this payment plan up and can't go into a store this is all just bull crap I've paid them so much money and I Kno damn well I didn't owe this much money to them the acct is in my bfs name he's tired of messing with it so guess we're keeping the phones and goin to another company it's funny how a cell phone company will screw u over so fast

If I could give them a zero I would. I have had T Mobile for 5 months. Every month I have been overcharged. My service has been interrupted multiple times. Coverage is terrible and customer service is even worse.

when I had tmobile I thought it was good until they started their roaming fees. Working in the travel industry my favorite thing in Wyoming is I get yelled at for tmobile, At&T, Sprint, Boost, etc doesn't work in this area and clearly the cashier is at fault for it.. I laugh at them calling themselves the best company. The reason I am with Verizon is it WILL work almost everywhere and NEVER any issue in Wyoming with it

If I could give a 0 for the horrible experience in trying to obtain T-Mobil service. Was asked security questions since I placed a fraud alert at Credit Bureau. Credit dept stated I didn't pass security questions test. Associate was very rude. After calling Corporate Office I called At&T and was asked same questions and passed. T-Mobil is so unprofessional. Need to rethink your Process.

T-mobile is the last phone carrier I would recommend for somebody Ill drive 2 minutes down the road and have no bars at my friends house, i have no connection in my f-ing basement for crying out loud. Whenever I have full bars it’s hours away from my house and even with full bars it still doesn’t work for some reason🧐I’ll tell you one thing t-mobile is the opposite of good,and I’m switching as soon as possible. It’s funny that literally everyone that has T-Mobile wants to switch. You’d think that you would actually try and fix it.

I had a billing issue that customer service was not able to fully handle. I asked for the corporate office email and wrote a brief detailed complaint with proof of my billing issue. I was contacted the next day by Vanessa with the corporate office who was excellent, she helped solve my issue and was very helpful, knowledgeable and curious. Thank you, Salimah

I'm in Ann Arbor, Michigan. T-Mobile's towers have been down for the second day now and I can't make phone calls. What carrier in today's modern world can have that happen? If you depend on your phone, don't go with T-Mobile

T mobile suck, just cut and dry, they suck!!!  Customer service is awful and the representatives working in their stores have a mindset that of a toddler!!  Run and then run some more from these crooks!!  I use to like T mobile but now they don’t care about their people.  My grandmother was setup on auto pay and for some reason t mobile canceled her service but she’s been charged every month since February.  Now, we keep getting the run around, my grandma is 83 yrs old and I’m trying to handle her business.  But she lives in GA and I’m in TX and t mobile customer service keeps directing her to go to one of the local stores.  Only for them to give her an 800 # to call.  I guess money is that tight, you have to steal from out seniors!!

Decided to leave Sprint before the rush.  Went to the T Mobile store at N 14th St & Citizens Blvd, Leesburg, Fl.  Met with Briana and Renee.  Bought two Galaxy A71 5G phones and service.  Our plan even beats out our old Sprint plan.  All information in our 6 year old phones transferred with no problem.  The whole process took about 30 minutes. Phones work perfectly.  Service is great.  No regrets.  Many thanks to Briana and Renee for the service and conversation.

I switched to t Mobil to bundle with my wife's plan.  This was attractive on price but that is about where it ends. My biggest issue is coverage.  If your coverage sucks, price is irrelevant   For context, I live in a residential suburb of a metro area with 1.4 million people.  I rarely get over 2 bars and work from home which is a problem now.  Cellular data is very slow everywhere!  Steaming music constantly drops out, websites drop and GPS freezes when driving.  I never had these issues with at&t or Verizon.  I switched from Total wireless because of their limited data but I never had issues with coverage. Turns out they use the Verizon network.   T Mobil has no coverage in Cape Charles, VA, many parts of the Easter shore, poor signal in rural PA or MD and very spotty coverage in outer banks of NC. Basically sucks anywhere there is low density.  Unless I am fishing couple miles into Chesapeake Bay.  For some reason I get 3 bars there but nothing on shore.  Absolutely worthless in most areas I frequent.  Extremely disappointed.  Basically worthless. Over promised, under delivered.  Now store reps agree coverage is weaker in my key areas vs other carriers.  Said it will be a couple years before that changes.  A bit dishonest IMO.   Thought my wife's complaints were due to technology challenges.   I was wrong

I went to the Progress Ridge store with an uncomplicated request.  The gentleman helping me was no help.
Then Julie took over!  What a delight!  She fixed all the issues that first gentleman created.  He’s lucky I didn’t get his name.  All I wanted was a new SIM card put into a different phone.  He wouldn’t let me in the store,  it was 93 degrees outside and no customers in the store!!  He said we’re in the shade.
He kept handing my phone to the employee inside.  I said this is ridiculous and that’s when Julie came to my aid.  Thank God.  Train your employees for Gods sake.  I was there on Monday afternoon July 20th around 2:00pm

I have been with T mobile for 5ish months now and it was a huge mistake. My service is awful in my own home. I live in a heavily populated area ofd hull street and genito, they sent me a service booster box that did not help and I can not even sit in my living room and send a text message. It is unacceptable. I was with Verizon before and was only paying $20 more for unlimited for my wife and I and making the switch to tmobile was the biggest mistake I have done. I can not wait to switch back from this AWFUL service. Customer service at their stores is good, but they cannot fix the bad service in general. I would not recommend at all.

Kylie and Brian in Portland Tennessee branch. Are the reason why I will continue to be a T Mobile customer! Superior customer service. Some may say it’s their job to take care of a customer, but they went above and beyond! It wasn’t just their job it was their character! They truly know good customer service

We have had a business account for 8 months. We were given promotions for switching and opening a business account. Two months in, we lost all promotions and they could not tell us why. Months into “fixing” the problem and nothing has happened. Only my local store has called to follow up. We have been promised this and that to make it seem like something is getting done. They keep saying to wait 7-10 days for it to “fix”. It’s been MONTHS of calling and nothing getting done. If our business is not appreciated, they will not have to have it. I do not recommend to residential OR Business owners. Save your time and energy on another company. Did I mention their service is trash? We have dropped calls with clients all the time. This was the worst business decision to date. Thanks for not taking us seriously. We are gladly moving on.

I found the customer service  department  good. I had issues with the  service.  I had a very  spotty  connection  no matter  where I  was,even in my house. I have to have service as I don't  have a home phone. 
So I  went back to Verizon  and it's  great with no problems. 
The bad thing is that I owe  t mobile for 2 phones amounting to $240.
I  regret ever leaving  Verizon.
Struggling to change my address, even though I've followed the instructions. Very frustrating 😒

We changed our service over to Verizon because people at T-mobile are not good with customers at all with my family I had 7 lines with them and they upset me every time I called for customer service do you're blood pressure a favor and don't use them as a phone carrier

I'd of given a zero star if I could. This is the only phone company that gives UNABLE TO REACH SERVER!! at least once a month!! Not even boot-leg boost or cricket!! I'm a single mother! What if I wasn't going straight home tonite & had a dang emergency?! I wouldn't be able to place a call for help! That's what!!

It is unfortunate that T-Mobile promotes their customer service as your personal customer care “expert”.  THERE IS NOTHING EXPERT ABOUT THEIR CUSTOMER SERVICE.  As a business customer, I have had the ABSOLUTE WORST EXPERIENCES- (every time I have to call customer service) dealing with the limitations and their inability to resolve issues.  They talk circles around you like you don’t understand what they’re saying the first time, which only ends up being a verbal spin on the fact that they can’t do anything to resolve the problems adequately.  They put you on multiple long holds, then return with the verbal spins on the fact that they are NOT ABLE TOO  REVOLVE the issues adequately, until they finally get you frustrated enough to give up.  I would warn anyone who is hoping to have “traditional customer care,” when people were able to take care of complex issues without wasting your time.  CUSTOMERS PAY THE PRICE FOR BAD CUSTOMER SERVICE  caused by their business failings ( i.e. issues with THEIR MERGER WITH SPRINT merger which causes long outages and dropped calls.).  I realize now, after talking to the 150th person that the REASON for the bad lateraled customer service is the intentional INFRASTRUCTURES OF THEIR POWERLESSNESS customer service platform and model.

@TMobile your company is taking advantage of this COVID situation. With the excuse of we are in dificultades times making mistakes that cost money to the costumers and then retracting what you offered. I hope people think twice before sign in with @TMobile very disappointing🤬

I know T mobile has pretty nice deal and cheap. But I really got frustrated when I see the 5G speed is not even the speed upto 3G. What is the use of saying US largely covered the 5G network but no speed. Are you guys kidding and fooling customers. I am using T mobile almost since 8 years. But this year I am totally mad on their fake and fooling strategy.  When I called them then they say we have low band of 5G so it doesn't give the that speed. Common why should we care what band , all we care the speed as other network provider is giving to their customers. When I compared with AT&T 4G and T-Mobile 5G , AT&T was way high speed than T-mobole.
I have had T-Mobile for years, and absolutely no complaints.

I'm paying 55$ per month for unlimited data and I make a hotspot for laptop, couple of month ago I exceeded the 100GB limit for high speed, but internet connection was still really good. But speed dropped after it for hotspot all of a sudden. Now it's just impossible to browse anything, I didn't find where to contact them via email, because it's REALLY timme consuming to wait in the 30 - 60 minutes line to call them. It's too expensive and not worth it

T-mobile blocks my text message for no reason.  When they found out it's a mistake, they said the process needs 6-10 days to reactive my text!!  I asked them why it needs to take so long and all they are saying is that is a process, but they don't even know what that process is.......this is crazy!!!  They are not even trying to understand why it takes so long and just gives me the standard answer!!!  I ended up talked to the manager for a few hours and she was able to understand the process a little better, but still not able to help in her level.  It's pretty  hopeless with T-mobile customer service........
t-mobile overcharging me for the last four years and they won't give my money back do not trust them check your bill

T-Mobile in Neshaminy mall 
Worst customer service experience I’ve ever had. I bought a phone a few weeks ago and they offered me a case and a screen protector, 2 weeks later I still don’t have my screen protector. Because it’s not in stock. Every time I go in the store I got dummies telling me the order is on its way ,or that the order should be in today. They tell me to call the store even give me the girls phone number to call her and you know what I get. Still a big bag of nothing. Will never go back to that crap hole service of a place. Will drive the extra 15 mins to get to another T-Mobile store. Have a nice day you losers. And if we’re being completely honestly should prolly find new employees that actually want to do a job, not just hiring a teenager who doesn’t know who to work a computer. Big waste of my day
Lately service has been bad to many static and back ground noise so sorry I stayed with them

We switched our entire business of 10 cell phones to T-Mobile from Verizon. Huge mistake! T-Mobile is the worst carrier service we have ever seen!
Every hour it does affect our business in a negative way.

You guys are trash i have 4 bars but my data barely works in my home town fawk 
your service line
So slow now, no network anywhere.
We had Sprint till it was bought out. Now our service is very bad.

Been with T Mobile for about 4 months, I get ok service in Virginia but travel to NY once a month and that is where the service doesn't work, if I receive a call the phone won't ring and go right to voice mail, if I try to make a out going call, at time it will say no service or I will have to place the call 2 or 3 times before it will connect.
T-Mobile is untrustworthy and the service  is terrible and their customer service agents are not very bright.

Worst experience I have ever had dealing with a cell phone company. Been a Sprint Customer for 10 years, I will be canceling that service immediately.  
 Placed an order with T-mobile for 2 new lines and 2 new phones. Never received one of the phones. Over 8 hours on the phone with T-mobile  over the course of a week to try and figure out what happened. Never did have an answer, and keep getting transferred and hungup on. Finally just canceled it all together. Kept getting bills for 3 months , all different amounts. Had to call each time, over 2 hours each time. They would say it was resolved, and then I would get a call from a collection agency for $300 . 
 I called back and had them send me an e-mail stating I did not owe them anything, and had no plans with them. Just when I think its over, I get a bill for 958.32. For the phone I never got. I also got an email the same day saying they received the return for the phone I never got. I am not currently on hold with T-mobile trying to get this resolved as I type this review.  50 + minutes so far. I was Just told they will look into it and call me back on monday the July 13th. 
NEVER SIGNUP FOR T-MOBLE!!!!
ITS NOT WORTH THE NIGHTMARES!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Our family has spent with T-Mobile 2 years and I can only say that's the service from this company is a total disappointment. Horrible speed and reliability of the internet connection, no compensation for service break, and poor support. I saw 500Kb/sec speed quite often, the same situation with random disconnects and no intention from their side to fix these problems. Every week on Saturday we have a language lesson via Skype and every time this call was interrupted with the connection problems. Holy moly every time, it was easier sometimes to use mobile internet instead of T-mobile, because it was faster.

We changed internet provider and now I've started to forget about these problems. I hope you choose any other company because I couldn't recommend such a crap to anyone.

P.S. Don't forget to write them an email about the cancelation auto prolongation of the contract 2 months before you wish to stop this torture. Because they will finish your contract after exactly 2 months and you will pay for it in case it was prolonged automatically.
Slow at everything. The data, downloads, and even software updates.

they just stole 70 bucks from my card today and i quit them about a month ago and i wasn't even the responsible account holder, only reason they ever had my card number was because i paid my phone off, that was it. and called them up and the supervisor "Jenna" said it was me that did the payment online.. which it wasn't, i have not ever made a bill payment with them.. ever other then paying off my phone. on top of that our bill has never been late always on the 18 of every month, not on the the 7th like today, but either way the bill never should have come from my bank account i'm trying to make that clear.. "Jenna" (supervisor) said that "I" with my debit card made a payment online... that is a lie! and we changed company's we had to use out PIN # to get out numbers swapped over, yet here today when we give them the pin they say it don't match...HOW in the world? LIARS......... this company is Trash

In store experience was horrible they didn't even give me all my information about my account also I paid more money than I should of and they tried me with a down grade when I went they are for upgrade.

What a joke 
There coverage for Lost or broken phone replacement is A crime 
What a rip off ...... math 2 years of paying 15.99 a month 
Then charge me 240 for a refurbished phone that I can buy for a hell of a lot cheaper online what a scam and rip off ......could have bought a replacement for 299.00 refurbished and with more gb space lol never again

T-Mobile is a joke of a cell company they do false advertisement sitting there stating that they are oh so good that they're the best company for cell service it is a flat out lie everywhere I go I have dead spots my phone States I have full bars but constantly getting dropped not to mention their customer service is disrespectful and rude if I were you and considering T-Mobile I would go with Verizon if this website would give me an option to give them a minor star rating I would but unfortunately a one-star is a lowest that I can go fair warning do not go through T-Mobile they are a rip-off they will scam you and you will end up with constant dropped phone calls even though your phone says you have full bars

Terrible and highly expensive service never go with Tmobile. I canceled my contract over a year ago and I paid the final balance. 2 months later I get a collection bill in the mail sent to me for $297, weighing on my credit history that I'm trying to keep good so I can better my life. Tmobile does not care about their customers. Its a terrible, expensive service.

T mobile has became a terrible company and does not up hold there vaules. I have been a t mobile customer for 12 years and never have I been treated so bad In a store anqd in the product. I went to local store because brand new phone is glitching and all screwy. Was told there is a 14 day only return policy. So I am stick with a phone that does not work and with a crapy phone service provider. So I say is there a nothing provider that will not do any unethical practing? At&t looks like I'm headed your way and with all my 7 phone lines.

I had Sprint... this crap company T Mobile has destroyed my contract.. 4 phones 2 tablets.. they increased my bill 60 dollars told me I have 5 phones 2 tablets. And my sprint contract does not have to be honored its T Mobiles way. Service is absolute crap constantly getting huge lag spikes in data streaming we will not be staying in this low tech throttling crap company.

Sprint customer here. Ever since that horrendous Sprint T-Mobile merger went through my service has gone quickly downhill. My phones used to access Sprint’s amazing LTE band 41 that gave me lightning fast speeds of up to 220 Mbps. Now, all my phones do is access T-Mobile’s lame LTE bands which give me nothing but speeds of 0.01 Mbps. That is unacceptable. I was against that dreadful, dang blasted merger from the beginning, and now I’m against it more than ever. T-Mobile has ruined, destroyed and sabotaged a great thing that was once known as Sprint. This is way more than unacceptable, and T-Mobile is nothing but deplorable, irresponsible, and negligent with their outages and terribly dismal and nonexistent service.
This would be -100000000 stars if possible. I just discovered that T-Mobile been overcharging me for over a year. They will  not do anything about it. So, pretty much T-Mobile  has stolen from me.

Horrible service. I spoke with someone from the 611 number I dialed. They took care me, gave me Everything I want then told me to go to store and finish the transaction because their system was acting up. So I went to the store, and they said they don’t have anything in the their system. N they told me the I have to pay more now to get what I want. So I told them that but CSC person gave me another price and why are you giving me different price? He said he doesn’t know who I spoke with. I told him both of you work for T-Mobile so why both of you have different price? He said he doesn’t know. Lol... that’s T-Mobile.

Unexplained charges on my account missing payment and other 
Not transparency in dispute 
Inexperienced experts

Beware! I just discovered that for nearly two and half years T Mobile has been charging me $10 a month for an Apple watch service that I did not request. Further, it has never been paired with a device therefore never used. I discovered this when I went into a T Mobile store to upgrade my phone. When I called customer service they told me that they would refund me 2 months ($20) because it was my fault that I hadn't looked at my bill. They didn't seem to care that this service was added when I became a new customer and I have auto-pay. They were completely unwilling to extend any sort of customer service. I will definitely be looking to switch carriers very soon!

We have been T-Mobile customers for 2 years. Today we visited the store on 37th Ave SW Flagler St, Miami, Fl. We needed help with some apps. The associate who took care of us, José, was cordial, helpful, very knowledgeable, quick to explain our issues, pleasant and answered all our questions without hurry. We are in business ourselves so customer service matters greatly when we seek assistance. Jose has an excellent customer service attitude. We left the store very happy and will go back to see him for all our mobile service needs. We give a 10 in overall relaxed atmosphere to this store, no rush till we had all our concerns resolved. Thank you!! 
Grisel Garcia

sign on the T-Mobile app they're advertising a phone it was a OnePlus 7 it's in their deals the only thing is they do not have any in stock and do not know when they're getting it when you talk to them about it they say sorry it's the disease that's going around and they can't get it not sure if they're going to get it but this is been going on for weeks and they still are advertising it then I was talking to buy another phone that took a little time and they send me a signature I have to sign electronic signature and it doesn't have a send button I was on the phone for 5 hours and I got nothing at this time I'm not recommending T-Mobile to anyone they were very friendly very courteous oh we're sorry we're sorry we're sorry let me see what I could do but the end result is you got nothing they still or advertising that phone after weeks of knowing they don't have it I've been with T-Mobile for 6 years twice I tried to upgrade to a phone which I had trouble the only way I got a phone was by going to the store and even their prices were different than they said online so again just beware June 2020
Don't let the cheap price fool you don't do it

In April I changed my plan from simple choice to magenta plus to have more high speed hotspot, requested all other ads on stay the same, international call in particular. Come to find out, not only he set up my plan to start with new billing cycle but he removed my international statewide call add on. Talk to them again following week and put them them in service right away, even if in my app the international call adds on was always there!! May Bill's comes in with extra charges for international calls, tall to tmobile again and they tell me to pay only for the magenta plan and that charges of $127 will be removed next billing cycle. It did not happen and after assigning a specialist to check on it, they tell me charges will not be waived. If I had made the mistake I would have paid without issue but after being a client for 14 years and knowing I had international calling for at least 10 years it is crazy they are willing to loose me as a customer for such a small amount!
T-mobile needs to be OUT OF BUSINESS. WORST SERVICE NATION WIDE

I am writing about my experience on wifi from home. I have no phone now. They told me one thing and after 3 hours I went home with a phone that did not work now I have to pay over 100.00 to restock 2 phones that didn't work. I'm taking it to court so other people don't get misinformed like I did.

This is the WORSE phone! It won't hold all my contacts from my other phone. I see why they are almost giving it away. It should've been Free. It's a mess and I hate I wasted my money. Awful and I hope the folks that manufacturer this mess reads this Review
Sandra

Just started w/T-Mobile about 3/ 4 month. Been w/ US cellular for years, always having to watch for extra charges / changes on monthly bill, never the same.  T-Mobile- great friendly customer service, wish we could get better phone service, may have to change to another carrier due to running two businesses from cell phones.  Need more / better service from phones, I hope they can pull it together, I love my new phone, seems better set up.  PLEASE pass this info to the top to get some changes made fast....highly depend on phone service!  Thank you

I have been satisfied with T Mobile service, but the T Mobile location at Park & Preston in Plano,TX is a disaster. I took in my new iPhone 11 (purchased at this location) to transfer data from my iPhone 8. It took 8 HOURS! Yep. 8 hours. And they failed to transfer a telephone number correctly. It took 3 people, including a manager who had no idea what he was doing, to transfer the data. My advice, go to another location if you have to use T Mobile. Avoid this location at all costs!

Called their customer service line to get information about a promotion and about adding lines. Was told that under my current placit wouldn’t be wise to add lines and that it would be better to upgrade my plan before I add lines.  I asked the price and was given a price higher than what I’m now paying per line (she gave it to me as a lump sum thinking I wouldn’t add it up).  So I told her to look at my account and tell me what I pay.  She then LIED to me and gave me a number higher then what I paid.  I asked her if she was looking at my account right in front of her or just giving me the general price (my plan was grandfathered) to which she wouldn’t answer me!  She started repeating herself over and over agin being very short with me.  I finally brought my account up in front of me and called her out on it and then she just asked if I had anymore questions now that I knew how much I paid! 

Every time I’m on the phone with T-Mobile I get a text afterwords asking me to do a short survey about my call and she never sent it through!  I wish I remembered her name 

Unbelievable. Tried to upsell me by lying about my account

Ever since metro pcs merged with tmobile the service is horrible.  I always took pride is stating that my metro pcs was the best, no dropped calls, never a day without service. Now there are outages every day.  People rely on cell phone service, how can that be done with all the issues tmobile has. Horrible company.  Seriously thinking about switching, mind you I have 3 lines on my service.

You stand there waiting and then they speak their language and u stand there like a fool waiting.At the end of the day who gets what's left? Been there couple of times and not again.

I been with T-mobile for decades now, and I really never had a problem with them. I just purchased the new iPhone 11. Awesome phone!!! But I don’t have any reception wherever I go. The reps at T-mobile can’t give any valid reason why I am not getting any reception in the city that I live in. I can’t make calls, no one can hear me on the other end, the phone constantly cuts out!! There’s no point of having a phone if T-Mobile can’t get any reception!!!

My local store ordered the wrong phone for me.  I caught it when I got the email receipt a few hours later.  They never showed me a receipt or screen in store.  I paid in full $498.00.  The store manager cannot help me.  He contacted TMobile and the only solution is for me to wait and return the incorrect phone, then wait two weeks for them to credit my card, and to put out another $498 now to get my correct phone.  Unbelievable.  I have been with T Mobile for 15 years and pay for three lines and never miss a payment.  Time to make a switch.

just two months into t-mobile and what a mess.  i was signed up under the family plan 4 phones for 140.00.  i still had service for a month with previous provider so they mailed me the chips and charged the 20.00 per phone activation fee.  so it comes time to switch over had to get new phones. Oh and I ended up paying for the phones cause they told me 4 days in that sale ended.  Impossible to get a supervisor.  So now my bill is supposed to be 180.00 a month well this month with a 24.00 credit they deducted 181.00 out of my checking account.  So now i deal with them again.
Your customer service is by far the worst I have ever experienced. They all tell me a different answer to the same ? They are rude, incondiserste, and not helpful what so ever

text: T mobile is the worst company I have ever dealt. Customer service is so bad. When the customer service person was talking over me and not being responsive , I asked to speak to a manager and was told there was no manager available and refused to transfer me. I have had an account with these guys in good standing for the past several years. When I moved all the phones and tablets off that service and tried to cancel. I was told I couldn’t open my account and are still charging me a monthly fee for nothing. There are no phones on this account and yet they keep charging me $75 a month. Terrible! I will tell anyone I know to avoid this company!!!!!

I was with T-Mobile for two years. The major problem I had was that the sales associates were not knowledgeable about products, phones, nor troubleshooting. It didn’t matter what T-Mobile store location I went to or who I spoke to on the phone; when asked anything they were either clueless or would just tell me anything to get the sale or to be done with the issue.
Also they did not have any good incentives for current or long term customers. All the deals for people switching from other networks but nothing for your regular customers.
I added a third line which was suppose to be free but it actually wasn’t and my bill was increased by nearly $70. If I had known that l wouldn’t even had added the line; and it just reiterates my point about the associates not knowing what they’re talking about and only trying to get a sale.
And lastly my coverage was horrible once I downgraded my plan. I had no choice because that third line had my bill too high. I was paying WAY too much for three lines. I’m glad I switched to another carrier(AT&T)and I  haven’t had any complaints since.

i would give it a half star if possible.  the website is deplorable for several years.  down all the time, doesn't interface worth a crap and Digits is a joke..fire the programmers and fix it.  Hello Verizon.  They know it's bad, they don't care.  Racing into the 80's
Jason at the store on Kellogg and Rock is awesome. His customer service skills are great!! He helped me so much today and got me serviced with a sweet phone. 10 stars for Jason!!
Worst mobile carrier... I’ve had them for more then a year now and not only do I have horrible service, but they restrict random numbers that allow me to access my mobile banking.
Service is horrible, customer service doesn't want to help. Thinks all mobile services are the same. Overall just over paying for bad service

After 15 years, my relationship with t mobile is over. Yesterday I called in to upgrade my phone. I was told of an offer that I agreed with...but they would not mail me the new phone, I had to go to the mall  in person to complete. As we are in the mist of a global pandemic, that seemed problematic. At the mall, after waiting in line with mask, I was told that was not a valid offer and would have to move to a new contract at a much higher cost. At home again was told not to worry, go back to the mall and have the manager call in to verify the deal and that there was a notation on the account to satisfy the manager. At the mall I was turned away again with the admonishment that “ customer service will tell you anything to get you off the phone and in the store”. After 2 visits to a Covid hot spot mall, I now need to self isolate from family for 14 days, as a family member has a compromised immune system do to cancer. T mobile has gone from ‘cool to cruel’
I will now try a new plucky upstart company called Ting with fingers crossed.

30 minutes of waiting then 25 more on a callback from an “expert” with no resolution to questions, including a transfer where no info on previous discussions.  Then no response - dead call. 

If you have this type of time to spare then T-Mobile may be right for you.  

If you don’t have endless time to hang out and hope for an answer you may look elsewhere for “service”.

I would like  to start out by saying that I’ve been a T-Mobile customer a little over 2 years and I’ve always had great experiences with T-Mobile however to day I received exceptional customer service from JASMINE she went above and beyond to help me with a very troublesome situation I was dealing with from the insurance provider assurant JASMINE  did a 3rd party call and stayed on the line for over 30 min until she was able to rectify a problem on assurants behalf that they weren’t willing to help even though they are the ones who were not able to fulfill their end of the bargain and send me a device within the 24 48 hours promised they were saying that it could take up to 6 months or until they receive a phone like mine do to it being on back order however JASMINE from T-Mobile took charge and made sure that I would receive a phone within one business day and that is especially important due to the fact that it was for my special needs son who relies on his phone for safety concerns and I felt that JASMINE was not only doing her job but that she truly cared about the difficult situation I was dealing with and it meant so much to me and I will definitely stay with T-Mobile and their wonder staff !!!
I lost all service for 12 hours on Monday. I have been on hold, for customer support, for an hour and a half!  Tmobile is an absolutely terrible cell network! Im canceling today!

I would rate them lower if I could. They have been trying to fix my phone for no wireless coverage for weeks. It just has a screen that pops up and no wireless coverage. There is no warning. Yesterday talking to the Tmobile customer rep it dropped the phone call. With the new SIM card that took a week to get here it is better to only 1 outage a day. Great! Being a disabled senior citizen I need a phone!!! Tmobile is not providing the service I need.

I have used TMobile since they were even named T Mobile. They were called Sun Com.  I have found them to ALWAYS be cooperative and do everything in their power to help anyway needed. I would never change from T Mobile just because of their wonderful customer's service@

its negative two stars. cost me over $4000 dollars yesterday, not to mention the headache of trying to talk to somebody. internet work unless you tried to to get on tmobile website, tried to connect to thier "contact us" or even if you tried to get info for switching carriers. this tells me that not only is thier it department incompetent, but that they also screen your activity onli e to thier benefit. ive had enough of the nonsense and poor cellular service not to mention the total lack of customer support. so on my journy yesterday to figure out what was going on yesterday i discovered a how to video on how to fix " not registered on network" to fix the issue. did not work, i broke the phone trying to get the sim card out to check contacts and in the third step i erased my entire phone with still no working results.tmobile should have informed everyone what was happening when it started so we wouldnt have these issues. they have all of our email addresses. so as of now im taking applications for any phone company who can promise quality service and customer service for a fair price, which excludes verizon because they fukked me over already 8 years ago and i hold grudges. for t mobile, pay me what you cost me and replace the phone, otherwise i want a detailed letter from the ceo explaining what happened yesterday, why it happened, why it took 12 hours to fix and why you did not feel the need to contact your paying customers who you probly cant afford to lose. that letter will be going to my lawyer's desk.
